description: 開發-time / meta layer 的 opencode: 規劃-builder 技能 (seven-狀態 lifecycle + seven change modes), architecture documentation (architecture.md index + 依 topic wiki + 全域-architecture snapshot + docs/事件/), XDG/system 設定 management 使用 無-靜默-fallback enumeration, 與 tweaks.cfg runtime knobs. 已交付 (live 作為 的 2026-05-04).

activities.title: Drive 規劃 Builder Lifecycle
activities.description: ~/projects/技能/規劃-builder/. SKILL.md judgment + 9 bun-executed scripts. Drives specs/<slug>/.state.js在 across proposed → designed → planned → implementing → verified → living → archived, applying change modes (new / promote / amend / revise / extend / refactor / sync / archive).

activities.title: Initialize 或 Migrate Spec
activities.description: plan-init.ts creates specs/<slug>/proposal.md + .state.js在. plan-migrate.ts (與 ensureNewFormat() 在 every script 項目) does 在-touch peaceful migration 來自 legacy plans/<slug>/ 透過 infer狀態 + cp snapshot 到 .archive/pre-migration-YYYYMMDD/ + git mv (preserves history).

activities.title: Validate 狀態 Artifacts
activities.description: plan-validate.ts 是 狀態-aware: checks 僅 artifacts required 供 current 狀態. 缺失 future-狀態 artifacts 是 不 blockers. plan-gaps.ts produces code-independence readiness report.

activities.title: Promote 或 Apply Mode
activities.description: plan-promote.ts handles forward 狀態 advance plus non-forward modes. amend (living→living), revise/extend (living→designed), refactor (living→proposed, auto-snapshot 到 .history/refactor-YYYY-MM-DD/), archive (living→archived). plan-rollback-refactor.ts reverses refactor.

activities.title: Sync Drift Detection
activities.description: plan-sync.ts diffs git changes against data-schema.js在 fields, errors.md codes, test-vectors.js在 cases. Drift warned 不 blocked (exit 0). beta-工作流程 invokes after every 任務 checkbox toggle. Even clean runs 追加 {mode:sync, 結果:clean} 到 .state.js在.history.

arrows.label: operator slug + intent OR legacy plans/<slug>/ touch
advanced 狀態 + history 項目

activities.title: Maintain Architecture Documentation
activities.description: specs/architecture.md (~126KB cross-cutting index), 依 topic wiki entries (compaction.md, session.md, provider.md, attachments.md, agent-runtime.md, meta.md), specs/archive/全域-architecture/ IDEF0+GRAFCET reverse-engineering snapshot (67 activities, 66 GRAFCET steps, 100% traceability), docs/事件/事件YYYYMMDD <topic>.md narrative 記錄.

activities.title: 更新 Cross-Cutting Index
activities.description: specs/architecture.md 是 無 longer subsystem-authoritative — it 是 index pointing 到 依 topic wiki entries. Architecture Sync checkpoints 記錄 'Verified (無 doc changes)' 或 link 到 updated topic 檔案.

activities.title: 專案 Living Specs 作為 Wiki
activities.description: Each living-狀態 package's 來源-的-truth claim 是 folded 進入 specs/<topic>.md. Legacy folders remain under specs/<slug>/ 直到 peacefully migrated 到 specs/archive/.

activities.title: 追加 事件 記錄
activities.description: docs/事件/事件YYYYMMDD <topic>.md narrative 供 incidents 與 architectural shifts. 規劃-builder phase summary ritual writes phase-boundary entries during implementing.

activities.title: 刷新 全域 Snapshot 在 Demand
activities.description: specs/archive/全域-architecture/ 是 單次-回合 reverse engineering 透過 miatdiagram 技能. NOT regenerated 依-change; updated 僅 when 使用者 explicitly asks 供 fresh codebase-wide snapshot.

arrows.label: explicit 全域-architecture 刷新 請求

activities.title: Manage XDG 與 System 設定
activities.description: 全域.路徑 resolves XDG 使用 OPENCODE DATA HOME 釘選 (auto-set 在 NODE ENV=test 到 依 pid tmpdir). 設定.get() load檔案→LKG snapshot fallback (~/.local/state/opencode/config-lkg.js在) 使用 HTTP 503 不 500, structured body, 無 raw 設定 文字. loadSplit() isolates main/Provider/mcp 解析 failures. Provideravailability derived 來自 accounts.js在 + providers.js在 override; legacy disabledProvider read 供 單次 cycle. AGENTS.md backup whitelist 必要 before 規劃 implementation; restore never automatic.

decomposition.diagram_title: Manage XDG 與 System 設定

activities.title: 解析 XDG 路徑
activities.description: 全域.路徑 在 src/global/index.ts. Honours XDG *HOME; OPENCODE DATA HOME pins all four under <root>/{設定,data,狀態,快取}. NODE ENV=test auto-pins 到 依 pid tmpdir 到 prevent 2026-04-18 accounts.js在 wipe recurring.

activities.title: Load 設定 使用 LKG fallback
activities.description: config.ts loadFile() 拋出 json錯誤 → 記錄.warn + read config-lkg.js在 (atomic-rename written 在 every successful load) → 返回 {設定, 設定stale:true}. server/app.ts 在錯誤 converts 設定json錯誤/設定invalid錯誤 到 HTTP 503 使用 {code, 路徑, line, column, hint} body.

activities.title: Section-Isolate Sub-檔案 Loads
activities.description: loadSplit({main, Provider, mcp}). opencode.js在 must succeed (或 LKG); providers.js在 failure → empty override + 記錄.warn; mcp.js在 failure → MCP disabled + 記錄.warn (lazy connect means daemon still boots).

activities.title: Backup Whitelist Snapshot
activities.description: Before 規劃 implementation / first edit / first test command: snapshot whitelist (accounts.js在 必要 + opencode/managed-apps/gauth/mcp/mcp-驗證/openai-codex-帳號/模型/Provider/AGENTS + legacy ~/.local/share/opencode/accounts.js在) 到 ~/.config/opencode.bak-YYYYMMDD-HHMM-<slug>/. Restore 是 never automatic — 使用者 requests explicitly.

arrows.label: process env (XDG *, OPENCODE DATA HOME, NODE ENV)
已解析 全域.路徑.使用者
規劃 slug + execution gate firing
HTTP 503 structured 錯誤 或 live 設定
backup folder 路徑 (printed 在 completion)

activities.title: Tune Runtime Knobs 透過 tweaks
activities.description: /etc/opencode/tweaks.cfg INI-style operator tunables. Tweaks namespace 於 packages/opencode/src/config/tweaks.ts loadEffective() 於 module init. 缺失 檔案→defaults+記錄.info; invalid value→依-key default+記錄.warn; unknown key→記錄.warn skip; OPENCODE TWEAKS PATH env override. Cross-key invariants enforced (INV-7 tailwindowkb<=partinlinecapkb; uifreshnessthresholdsec<hardtimeout; 工具輸出budget上下文ratio<=1).

arrows.label: current wiki + 事件 記錄
使用者 edits XDG / system 檔案
backup whitelist gate satisfied → 規劃 may enter implementing
規劃-builder phase summary triggers docs/事件/ 追加
structured 503 在 設定 錯誤 / runtime 設定
